report.summary: Day 72 standup v18: BTC $70,525-$71,300 (holding). F&G 11 (Extreme Fear) — 46-day streak. DELTA: Build-v14 shipped Onchain Privacy Infrastructure + World Chain Proof of Personhood guides (batch 19). 1,186 total page.tsx (+2 from v17). PUBLISH_QUEUE has 2 items ready. git index.lock NOW 20+ hours — 95 pending files (21 modified + 74 untracked). ~24 hrs to Thu convergence. 89 agent runs today ($7,217).

sections.title: Analytics
items: MARKET UPDATE: BTC $70,525-$71,300 (flat since v17). 24h range $70,450-$71,890. ETH ~$2,166-$2,327. Realized volatility compressed at 28% annualized — coiling before Thu catalysts.
F&G INDEX: 11 (Extreme Fear). 46-day streak below 25. Dropped from 14 to 11 intraday — deepening fear despite stable price action. Historical entries at F&G <25 average +18% in 30 days (Glassnode).

SPOT ETF FLOWS: Mar 25 outflows continuing — Fidelity FBTC -$45M. Net -$66.6M on Mar 24. March total inflows dropped 73% to $890M from Feb $3.3B peak. Institutional capital rotating to tokenized treasury products ($12.8B March flows).

DELTA SINCE v17: Build-v14 shipped 2 new learn guides (batch 19): Onchain Privacy Infrastructure (~3,200 words, Railgun $4.49B vol, Aztec Ignition, Privacy Pools) + World Chain Proof of Personhood (~3,200 words, 18M+ World ID users, AgentKit, WLD). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE. Total page.tsx: 1,186 (+2). 253 learn guide dirs.

TOP CONTENT PERFORMANCE: Fear & Greed Timeline (+95%), Options Calculator (+93%), ETF Complete Guide (+92%), Congressional Tokenization (+90%), Tokenized RWA Guide (+88%). NEW: Privacy Infrastructure + World Chain guides queued.

OPTIONS EXPIRY (~24 hrs): $13.5-$14B on Deribit. BTC max pain $75K-$86K. Put/call ratio 0.85. Gamma hedging starts 12-18 hrs before settlement. BTC at ~$70.5K = well below max pain = gravitational pull UP.

SEC 91 ETF RULING (~24 hrs): Final deadline Mar 27 for 91 crypto ETF applications across 24 tokens. 16 cryptos classified as commodities Mar 17 (incl XRP, SOL, ADA, LINK). NYSE/Nasdaq/Cboe removed ETF options position limits on 11 funds.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: 🔴 BLOCKER PERSISTS [P0]: git index.lock since 09:58 UTC — now 20+ hours. 95 pending files (21 modified + 74 untracked, up from 88 at v17). Every hour = missed indexing before Thu catalysts. Jefe: rm .git/index.lock → git add -A → commit → push → Vercel redeploy.

DONE SINCE v17: Build-v14 created Onchain Privacy Infrastructure guide + World Chain Proof of Personhood guide (batch 19). EOD-v17 confirmed 524 unique published slugs, 4 new pages verified. Community-v14 and Design-v14 ran.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items pending promotion (onchain-privacy-infrastructure-guide-2026, world-chain-proof-of-personhood-guide-2026) — both page.tsx verified.
PUBLISHED STATUS: 524 unique published slugs (per EOD-v17). 1,186 total page.tsx files (+2 from build-v14). 37+ pages published today across 19 batches.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 142 TS errors (119 in lido-v3 — JSX escaping). 103 slugs without page.tsx (legacy gap). Rate limiter 0/6 routes.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 17 duplicate slugs. ~120 learn pages missing OG images. /api/market-metrics 404. AI Agent Frameworks page missing JSON-LD.
TODAY'S CUMULATIVE OUTPUT: 32 learn guides built, 30+ OG images, 154+ social posts drafted, 32+ SVG cards, 49+ UX fixes across 89 agent cycles. Content calendar loaded through Fri Mar 28.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR index.lock + MASS COMMIT + DEPLOY: 20+ hours blocked, 95 files stuck. Thu convergence is ~24 hours away. $13.5B options expiry + 91 SEC ETF rulings converging. 1,186 pages MUST be live when this hits. Our privacy, World Chain, tokenized RWA, and ETF content is perfectly positioned. Every hour of delay is lost indexing time.

PRIORITY 2 — PROMOTE 2 QUEUE ITEMS + BUILD NEXT BATCH: Privacy Infrastructure & World Chain guides verified and ready. Next build targets: (a) post-convergence analysis pages (options expiry recap, SEC ruling outcomes), (b) tax content refresh (20 days to April 15), (c) XRP/SOL/ADA ETF deep-dives (riding SEC commodity classification for 16 tokens).

PRIORITY 3 — FIX TS ERRORS + TECH DEBT: 142 TS errors (mostly JSX escaping in lido-v3). Fix would drop to ~23 errors. Also: missing JSON-LD on AI Agent Frameworks, 103 legacy slugs without page.tsx, 17 duplicate slugs.

STRATEGIC SIGNAL: Convergence window tightening — 24 hrs to Thu's dual catalyst (options + SEC). F&G dropped from 14→11 (deepening fear despite stable price). March ETF inflows down 73% but tokenized treasuries attracted $12.8B = institutional rotation accelerating. Privacy narrative gaining traction (Vitalik's 'HTTPS moment' framing, Railgun $4.49B vol). World Chain/proof-of-personhood is emerging 2026 narrative (18M+ verified users). Stablecoins $313B ATH = dry powder. degen0x has content covering ALL these angles — deploy is the bottleneck.
